allow: PowerShell($resp = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8081/debug-bandsintown?city_slug=chicago-il" -Method GET -TimeoutSec 30; $data = $resp.Content | ConvertFrom-Json; Write-Host "Type: $\($data.type\)"; if \($data.type -eq "next_data"\) { Write-Host "Keys: $\($data.keys -join ', '\)" } else { Write-Host "HTML snippet:"; Write-Host \($data.html_snippet.Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(1000, $data.html_snippet.Length\)\)\); Write-Host "JSON blobs found: $\($data.json_blobs_found\)" })

PowerShell($resp = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8081/debug-bandsintown?city_slug=chicago-il" -Method GET -TimeoutSec 30; $data = $resp.Content | ConvertFrom-Json; $html = $data.html_snippet; Write-Host $html.Length; $html | Select-String -Pattern "api|endpoint|graphql|/events" -AllMatches | ForEach-Object { $_.Matches } | Select-Object -First 20 Value)
